name: HDFC Bank AI Customer Support
scenario: HDFC Bank wants to reduce support wait times from 12 minutes to 0 seconds. Build an AI-powered customer support service that answers banking questions, fetches real account data via tools, and protects against prompt injection — all within the existing Spring Boot backend.

core.description: HdfcAiService @Service: inject ChatClient.Builder, call .defaultSystem() with HDFC Bank persona (banking only, professional, concise). .build() to create ChatClient.
AccountDataTool @Component: @Tool-annotated methods getBalance(accountId) and getRecentTransactions(accountId). Register with defaultTools() on ChatClient.
answer(sessionId, customerId, question): parameterized prompt (.text(template).param()), call(), return content(). Use accountId as context parameter.
PromptInjectionGuard @Service: detect 'ignore previous', 'you are now', 'system:' patterns. Throw IllegalArgumentException on injection attempt. Max input length 2000 chars.
AiRateLimiter @Service: Bucket4j, 20 calls/minute per customerId. Throw RateLimitException on exceeding limit.
@SpringBootTest (4 tests): tool returns balance, injection blocked, rate limit enforced, normal call succeeds. All pass.

bonus.description: BeanOutputConverter<SupportResponse>: structured output with category (BILLING/TECH/FRAUD/OTHER), answer, requiresHuman. Temperature=0.1. Test: converter schema contains 'category'.
ConversationHistory @Service: Map<sessionId, List<Message>>. addMessage(), getHistory(). Multi-turn: AI remembers earlier messages. Test: history grows with each turn.
AiAuditLog JPA entity + @Async audit service: log every call (prompt, response, model, latencyMs, hadError). @DataJpaTest: successful and error calls logged.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. ChatClient.Builder: Spring AI autoconfigures this — inject ChatClient.Builder (not ChatClient directly). @Tool annotation: marks a public method as callable by the AI. The AI decides when to call it — you don't call it manually. API key: spring.ai.anthropic.api-key=${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY} in application.yml — NEVER put the actual key in the file. Prompt templates: use .text(template).param(key, value) instead of string concatenation — parameterized inputs cannot break out of the template structure (injection safety). BeanOutputConverter.getFormat(): include this as a parameter in your user message so the AI knows exactly what JSON schema to produce.
